title: Choccy's Craftable Nametags
description: A vanilla oriented mod that simply adds a crafting recipe for nametags.
body:
Have you ever wanted to name a sheep "jeb", but didnt have any nametags? Well this is a vanilla friendly mod that just adds a long over do recipe that allows you to craft nametags. The recipe requires three string, a slimeball, and an iron ingot.

![Recipe used to craft a nametag](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2fecf7d97f24aa9067b2abdf31d0478d25036cbd.png)
